content:
# elizaos/elizaos.github.io Monthly Report (May 2026)

## 🚀 Highlights
Development activity for May 2026 was focused on refining the project's configuration management infrastructure. The primary effort centered on improving environment variable handling to ensure more robust integration within the framework. The month was characterized by targeted maintenance aimed at enhancing the project's technical configuration.

## 🛠️ Key Developments
### Configuration Management
The primary technical focus for the month involved improving how the project handles environment variables. 
*   **Environment Variable Handling:** Work was initiated to update the project's configuration to better support environment-specific variables. This effort is represented by PR [#248](https://github.com/elizaos/elizaos.github.io/pull/248), which introduces the `ImportMetaENV` interface to `next.config.js`. This refactoring effort aims to improve the consistency and type safety of environment configurations within the codebase.

## 🐛 Issues & Triage
*   **Closed Issues:** There were no issues closed during this reporting period.
*   **New & Active Issues:** No new issues were opened, and there were no active issues recorded for the month of May 2026.

## 💬 Community & Collaboration
Collaboration during this period was centered on the review process for configuration updates. PR [#248](https://github.com/elizaos/elizaos.github.io/pull/248) remains the focal point of current development activity, as it is currently open and awaiting review. There were no other significant community discussions or collaborative events reported during this timeframe.
